creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Boris,

there hasn't been an update on your problem report for lang/sml-mode.el
(see [1]) for quite a while. I had a look at the port, and judging from
the Makefile, you should be able to set the variable EMACS_PORT_NAME in
/etc/make.conf or on the command line to select the desired emacs port.
(See /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.emacs.mk for possible values.)

Could you try and let me know if this solves the problem for you so this
PR can be closed?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/137541
